creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193409
py-django-auth-ldap-1.5.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-django-auth-ldap to 1.5.0.

Changes by upstream:
- https://django-auth-ldap.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html

Changes to the port:
- changed RUN_DEPENDS (assigned to Django 1.11 + added net/py-ldap)
- added NO_ARCH
- added DOCS option with the appropriate dependencies
- removed if/else statement for version specific Python LDAP packages because net/py-ldap can be used for Python 2/3 and thus net/py-pyldap is deprecated
- updated WWW

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
